name: neko-core
description: Mot chu meo trong terminal, chi muon meo meo - va lam viec. Local-first, config-first, offline-capable.
author: The Wiii Lab

scripts.build: bun build --compile --tsconfig-override tsconfig.build.json --define process.env.NODE_ENV="'production'" --windows-icon=assets/neko.ico --windows-title="Neko Core" --windows-publisher="The Wiii Lab" --windows-version=$npm_package_version --windows-description="Neko Core" --windows-copyright="MIT (c) 2026 The Wiii Lab" --outfile dist/neko bin/neko.ts && dist/neko __uiprobe
